title: Banjara Hills Residential Burglary
description: A bungalow in Banjara Hills was burgled while the family was at a wedding. Perimeter wall scaled, rear door forced. Jewellery worth Rs 35 lakhs and two laptops stolen. Domestic help had been given the day off — suspected to be involved.
modus_operandi: Wall scaling, rear entry, targeted high-value residential, inside knowledge of family absence, domestic help angle.

suspects.description: Male, athletic, scaled 8-foot compound wall, no CCTV coverage at rear

evidence.description: Shoe impressions on wall top and garden mud, size 9
Partial fingerprint on rear door handle
Neighbour saw unfamiliar auto parked outside at 2 PM

blind_spots: Domestic help not questioned until day 5
Shoe impression not cast until day 3
Jewellery not registered on stolen property database until day 7
resolution: Domestic help phone records showed contact with convicted burglar. Suspect arrested day 13. Jewellery recovered.
